sentiment: We build walls of trust, only to find the doors were never locked.

stories.title: GitLost: We Tricked GitHub's AI Agent into Leaking Private Repos
stories.summary: Security researchers demonstrated how GitHub's Copilot AI agent could be manipulated into disclosing private repository contents through carefully crafted prompt injection attacks.

stories.title: How to Build a Minimal ZFS NAS Without Synology, QNAP, TrueNAS
stories.summary: A hands-on guide to setting up a lean ZFS-based network attached storage system on bare metal, bypassing commercial NAS appliances and heavyweight distros.

stories.title: Tenda firmware (multiple versions) contains hidden authentication backdoor
stories.summary: CERT disclosed that Tenda router firmware ships with a hardcoded authentication backdoor across multiple models, allowing remote access without owner knowledge.
